title: Pre-Award — Pre-Award Spending (Advance Accounts)
content:
Morgan State University's Pre-Award Spending program allows a Principal Investigator or Project Director to begin spending on a sponsored project before receiving the official award documents. The Office of Research Administration, working with the Division of Finance & Administration, may authorize an Advance Account to support project start-up activities including personnel hiring, procurement, and other essential activities. Contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044.

Advance Account creation is limited to specific circumstances and requires formal review and approval. Requests may be considered when:
- An award has been granted but the project period has not yet begun;
- There is a high probability that the University will receive the award; or
- Continuation funding for a multi-year award is pending.

Approved spending is subject to sponsor and University requirements and is generally limited to 20% of total project costs or $100,000, whichever is less.

For more complete information, see PI Handbook 3: Grant-Related Processes and PI Handbook 5: Policies & Guidelines, both linked from the Resources / Principal Investigator Handbooks page.

The Application for Advance Account is submitted via DocuSign: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=aee73e60-47e3-456b-881d-6957d3650bcf&env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&v=2

key_facts.spending_cap: 20% of total project costs OR $100,000, whichever is less
eligibility: award granted but project period has not begun
high probability the University will receive the award
continuation funding for multi-year award is pending
